It is, by some measures, the single-largest concentration of executable work anywhere in the company. Saudi Arabia, where L&T was named the top contractor by project awards in 2023, is the epicentre. The transformation from niche exporter to the Gulf’s largest Indian EPC contractor happened gradually, then suddenly, across three distinct disruption cycles.
